name: working-methods
description: Cross-project working norms of David: adversarial grilling ×3 (/grill), session handoff (/handoff), y forge-on-claude (mapea Forge a Claude Code: ultrathink, ultracode/Workflow, worktrees, subagents, context pack). Para comms low-cost usa el plugin público caveman. Model routing (Opus dirige/revisa · Sonnet ejecuta · Haiku trivial) baked into the commands.
